notes: Solid Frogger implementation with all core mechanics (logs, turtles, vehicles, home bays, lives, timer, levels), but turtle width mismatch (w:120 but draws 3×40px turtles correctly), and the frog riding detection uses center-point which can feel slightly imprecise near log edges.
Excellent implementation of Frogger with complete mechanics, good collision detection, and proper visual feedback, though missing key debounce.

A solid and mostly complete Frogger clone with good controls and presentation, but it has notable authenticity/gameplay issues like non-time-scaled object speed, simplistic home-bay logic, and likely row/column alignment quirks that keep it well short of perfect.
